_comment: Species: Golden Exalt Sea Dragon (金尊海龙) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Golden Exalt Sea Dragon

canonical.appearance: Serpentine sea dragon 50 m long, scales golden-jade, crest of crystal horns, breath commands water
canonical.size: 50 m adult, 100000 jin; ancient 200 m, millions of jin
canonical.behavior: Solitary apex of seas; hoards water-attribute treasures; cultivates in ocean trenches
canonical.habitat: Deep seas, water-aspected apex spirit veins, ocean trenches
canonical.relationships: Wang Lin's bonded companion (N160); rival of cold dragon
canonical.bloodline: Sea-Dragon lineage; water-attribute true dragon bloodline (diluted)
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: Golden Sea Dragon core refines Ocean Sovereign Pills; supreme water-attribute alchemy material
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: Wang Lin's bonded sea dragon companion; its core commands oceanic qi

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
